checkAfterExecution(bytes32,bool).details: Called by the Safe contract after the execution of a transaction.      We use this post execution hook to compare the set of owners before and after.      If the set of owners has changed then we:      1. Add new owners to the lastLive mapping      2. Delete removed owners from the lastLive mapping

checkTransaction(address,uint256,bytes,u.details: Called by the Safe contract before execution of a transaction.

checkAfterExecution(bytes32,bool).notice: Update the lastLive mapping according to the set of owners before and after execution.

checkTransaction(address,uint256,bytes,u.notice: Records the most recent time which any owner has signed a transaction.

lastLive(address).notice: A mapping of the timestamp at which an owner last participated in signing a         an executed transaction, or called showLiveness.

safe().notice: Getter function for the Safe contract instance

showLiveness().notice: Enables an owner to demonstrate liveness by calling this method directly.         This is useful for owners who have not recently signed a transaction via the Safe.
